criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: Presence and quality of AI-driven tools for photo/video editing, such as object removal, background replacement, style transfer, smart enhancements, and AI-powered templates.

criteria.name: User Interface and Ease of Use
criteria.description: How intuitive and user-friendly the app is, especially for beginners.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The degree of control users have over the AI-generated or AI-assisted edits.

criteria.name: Quality of Output
criteria.description: Resolution, clarity, and overall visual appeal of the edited photos and videos.

criteria.name: Pricing and Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability of free versions, trial periods, and the cost of premium features.

criteria.name: Integration with Other Tools/Platforms
criteria.description: Seamless connectivity with other apps and platforms for importing and exporting media.

criteria.name: Range of AI effects and filters
criteria.description: The number of filters that are available for users to apply
